title: AWS cloud costs surge 18% for Indian enterprises amid rising compute demand
description: Indian enterprises are facing significant increases in AWS and Azure cloud bills as AI workloads and data processing demands spike. FinOps teams report budget overruns of 15-25% in Q1 2025.

title: RBI policy uncertainty weighs on IT spending decisions at large Indian banks
description: Following RBI's ambiguous stance on digital infrastructure investment, major private sector banks are delaying cloud migration decisions, creating cost inefficiencies in hybrid setups.

title: SaaS vendor consolidation wave hits Indian startups as funding winter persists
description: Series B and C stage startups are aggressively auditing SaaS subscriptions, finding 20-30% redundancy across productivity and analytics tools. Vendor duplication estimated at ₹2-5Cr annually per company.

title: Infosys, TCS warn of rising infrastructure costs impacting delivery margins
description: India's top IT exporters flagged escalating cloud infrastructure costs in Q4 earnings calls, with compute and data egress fees cited as primary margin headwinds in FY2025.

title: Data egress fees emerge as hidden cost killer for Indian cloud-native firms
description: A study of 50 Indian cloud-native companies reveals data transfer costs accounting for 12-18% of total cloud spend — far above the 5% industry benchmark — due to multi-region architectures.

title: Zepto, Blinkit infrastructure costs balloon as rapid commerce scales delivery ops
description: Quick-commerce platforms are seeing cloud infrastructure costs grow faster than revenue, with real-time inventory and routing systems requiring aggressive over-provisioning to meet SLA commitments.

title: SEBI tightens compliance requirements, forcing fintech cloud architecture overhauls
description: New SEBI data localisation norms require financial services firms to restructure multi-cloud deployments, adding estimated ₹8-15Cr in migration costs for mid-size NBFCs and brokerages.

title: Google Cloud expands India region capacity; competitive pressure on AWS pricing expected
description: Google's new Mumbai and Delhi cloud zones are expected to intensify pricing competition with AWS and Azure, potentially reducing compute costs by 10-15% for Indian enterprises by Q3 2025.

title: Idle cloud resources cost Indian enterprises ₹3,200 crore annually, report finds
description: A Gartner-commissioned study finds that zombie VMs, unused storage volumes, and over-provisioned databases account for 28% of total cloud spend in Indian enterprises, driven by lack of automated governance.

title: Meesho engineering team cuts AWS bill by 40% through aggressive FinOps programme
description: Social commerce platform Meesho publicly shared how its 6-month FinOps initiative — combining spot instance migration, rightsizing, and reserved capacity — saved ₹45Cr in annual cloud spend.
